title: Home Remodeling Profit Margin Jumps on Demand and Business Practices
content: Profitability for residential remodelers reached its highest level in nearly 30 years in 2024, according to NAHB’s most recent Remodelers’ Cost of Doing Business Study.

title: This $3B builder moves from California to Arizona—signaling something about the housing market’s next decade - Fast Company
content: This $3B builder moves from California to Arizona—signaling something about the housing market’s next decade  Fast Company
